title: Clear Cellophane Gift Wrap Roll (76cm x 30m) 1 Roll - Transparent & Versatile for Presents, Parties, & Crafts
features: CELLOPHANE GIFT WRAP ROLL: Elevate your gift presentation with this premium clear cellophane gift wrap roll, designed to add a touch of sophistication and protection to your presents, parties, and crafts.
ULTRA-CLEAR TRANSPARENCY: Showcase your creativity with this crystal-clear cellophane wrap, making any gift wrapping or crafting project look stunning, while keeping the contents visible and secure.

IMPRESSIVE SIZE & VALUE: This high-quality roll measures 76cm x 30m, providing plenty of wrapping material for multiple gifts, party favors, or crafts, maximizing value and convenience for all your creative endeavors.
SINGLE ROLL FOR EASY USE: One roll means hassle-free wrapping without extra tools or equipment, ensuring a smooth and efficient gift-wrapping experience, saving time and reducing waste.

UNLEASH YOUR CREATIVITY: Perfect for various occasions such as birthdays, weddings & holidays – this versatile cellophane wrap is an essential addition to your crafting and gift-giving arsenal, helping you create unique and unforgettable memories.
description: Product Description Match your gift presentation with elegant and neat wrapper using our Clear Cellophane Gift Wrap. 1 Roll Wrap - 30" x 100 ft. This product is a roll of clear cellophane wrap that measures 30" x 100 ft. This roll of clear cellophane wrap is great for crafts and wrapping gift baskets on birthdays, weddings, and other occasions. Made of quality clear cellophane material that could bring elegance to your party. This product is easy to use and can easily color match party supplies. Box Contains 1 x Cellophane Wrap 30-inch x 100-feet Roll-Clear
